programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Nine Inch Nails
programme.desc: Nine Inch Nails have surpassed many of their contemporaries by continually pushing the boundaries of what a rock act should do. For a band that has consistently battled the corporate side of the music industry they have still managed to sell over 20 million albums worldwide. Although presented as a live unit, the music of Nine Inch Nails is the sole output of Producer and singer, Trent Reznor. As a young multi instrumentalist,Reznor took up a job at Right Track Studio where he began to produce his first album 1989's 'Pretty Hate Machine'. 'Head like a Hole' was the second release from the debut. It enjoyed heavy rotation on radio, and would become the breakthrough song for the band. 'Broken' was a turning point for the sound of Nine Inch Nails. It was also the point when Reznor founded Nothing Records to step away from his deal with label TVT. Nine Inch Nails had entered the mainstream with the success of the album, 'The Downward Spiral'. But it would be five years before singer Trent Reznor would release his next record, 'The Fragile' in 1999. In a deal with Columbia Records Nine Inch Nails released the 2013 single, 'Came Back Haunted'. The video was directed by David Lynch. Featuring archive material, music videos – “HURT” “CLOSER” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses shocked and awed upon their arrival on the 80s rock scene. Their notoriety and musicianship bred sales of 150 million records, making them one of the world's biggest rock bands of all time. With his friend, Izzy Stradlin, Axl entered the Los Angeles music scene as the lead singer of rock band Hollywood Rose and from playing the Hollywood circuit, Guns N' Roses would soon emerge Signed to Geffen Records for a $75,000 advance, the band entered the studio to work on their debut, Appetite For Destruction Bassist Duff McKagan brought a riff to the recording studio and within three hours the band completed Welcome to the Jungle. The song would bring the group to the world's attention. After Welcome to the Jungle became an unexpected MTV hit, follow-up single Sweet Child of Mine was placed on heavy rotation on US radio play-lists. It went on to top the Billboard chart Featuring archive material, music videos – “PARADISE CITY” “WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Milky Chance
programme.desc: The German duet is back and better than ever! Milky Chance is the success story of two school friends, Clemens Rehbein and Philipp Dausch. After a long break, 2017 marks the release of a second, long-waited, album "Blossom". And, for the public, finally the occasion to discover live these new compositions, mixing rock, folk and electro pop. With reggae vibrations that can rub shoulders with house elements, Milky Chance has one of the most singular sounds. With the presence of musicians on stage, and if we believe the listening of the new record, we can expect more electric concerts, more electronic and even more energetic than in the past!

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Eva Luna - Fotos: Daniel besa a Eva en la calle y un investigador le toma fotografías. Laurita vuelve a su casay les pide a Daniel y Eva que se juren amor.

programme.title: La Clínica

programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E06 - Mi Voz es muy Importante: El conflicto entre Gaby y Cynthia explota durante la cena y Laura habla sobre su experiencia como víctima de secuestro.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Gran desesperación
programme.desc: Valeria le dice a Rocky que fue Luciana quien lo mandó golpear. Hugo intenta pasar la noche con Mili por la fuerza. Constancio y Luciana continúan teniendo encuentros a espaldas de Néstor y Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un amor imposible
programme.desc: Sonia se sorprende tras enterarse que Graciela y David se casarán. Por otro lado, David habla con Luciana y le confiesa todo lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le recrimina a Rosario que haya mentido respecto a su lugar de origen. Matilde le dice que Rosario tiene derecho a guardar secretos. Manuel le dice a Antonia que le buscará casa en el pueblo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Con mucho temor
programme.desc: Maricruz le dice a Perico que podría tener un hijo sordomudo como su hermana José Antonio es llevado a su casa herido, Miguel y Esther se espantan al verlo así.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Chantaje
programme.desc: Rodrigo lleva a Clarita al pueblo para sorprender a Gaviota en su cumpleaños. Minerva comienza a sospechar que Aarón la engaña de nuevo y le exige volver a su casa o confesará todo lo que sabe sobre él.

programme.title: Teresa: Planes de destrucción
programme.desc: Aída planea comprar las acciones de Martín para hacer que Teresa y Arturo se queden en la calle. Cutberto decide irse a Zacatecas para alejarse de Juana.

programme.title: Rubí: Seducción
programme.desc: Los padres de Alejandro se dan cuenta de que el doctor Bermúdez le ha quitado el crédito de la investigación a su hijo. Genaro le pide a Luis regresar a México luego de encontrarse a los papás de Alejandro y ver la cercanía con Sofía.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Fernando descubre a Rosario y a Armando intentado huir del pueblo. Fernando mata a Armando y a Rosario al saber que lo ha traicionado. Gabriela sospecha que Fernando la engaña con otra mujer.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Natalia amenaza a Bella con una pistola y jura matarla, pero Brenda logra impedirlo Bella presiona al gobernador para que se casen lo antes posible.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Los planes de Penélope para inculpar a María de un robo que no cometió fallan y descubren que es ella la verdadera culpable. Gonzalo le informa a María que será liberada.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a María Mercedes casarse con él. Santiago habla con el licenciado Portales y le exige que case a María Mercedes con él aunque ella no lo acepte.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le cumple a Santiago su última voluntad y se casa con él. Malvina recibe la noticia de que Santiago ha cambiado su testamento y teme haber perdido todo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: La hija del gobernador se burla de Inocencia y su aspecto San Genis le pide a Bella que se case con él, pues ya cumplió con su parte del trato de buscar a Sergio.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Natalia amenaza a Bella con una pistola y jura matarla, pero Brenda logra impedirlo Bella presiona al gobernador para que se casen lo antes posible.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo descubre que Ivana es la responsable de que el pueblo haya humillado a Valentina. Moisés le pide a Enriqueta que acepte el noviazgo de Sandra con Felipe. Rosendo enfrenta a Ivana para pedirle que se aleje de Valentina.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le cuenta sus deseos a Cristóbal sobre algún día poder llegar a ser padre. Por su lado, Asunción se muestra preocupada al ver que Hipólita se ha escapado de la casa.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Juana le confiesa a Diego que Hipólita tiene un hijo de Luis. Juana le dice a Hipólita que la única manera en que ella se puede quedar en México es estando separada de su hijo.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Martín le informa a Luis que Hipólita está en el convento y su criada se fue con el bebé. Fray Álvaro le dice a Luis que cumpla con sus funciones maritales y lo culpa por el estado de Esperanza.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Hipólita recibe un mensaje muy importante de Martín gracias a la ayuda de Margarita. Por su parte, Luis le ofrece a Hipólita ayuda para poder salir del convento.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Enriqueta le pide a Felipe que se aleje de Sandra. Ivana le pide a Leonor que la ayude a romper el compromiso de Valentina y José Miguel. Ivana le confiesa a Leonor que Federico está dispuesto a divorciarse de ella.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Crisanta cree que Timo está interesado en Iluminada. Valentina y José Miguel pasan un día de alegría en la feria del pueblo. Leonor le deja en claro a Federico que nunca le dará el divorcio.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe le pide a Moisés que lo ayude a reconquistar a Sandra. Gabriela comienza a sentir una gran atracción por Horacio al verlo cantar en la feria. Horacio vuelve a enamorarse de Ivana al verla llegar a la feria con un vestido muy provocador.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión
programme.desc: Florencia le confiesa a Damián que no está embarazada. Damián decide buscar a Elisa para impedir que se case con Gael.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana le exige a Toledo que se aleje de ella. Toledo idea un plan para reconquistar a Ivana. Leonor cree que Ivana tiene una relación secreta con Toledo. Valentina decide terminar su relación con José Miguel para evitar que Ivana los descubra.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Sandra y Felipe preparan todo para festejar su boda. Toledo le confiesa a Valentina el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Isabel es acosada por las presas de la cárcel, quienes le exigen una fuerte cantidad de dinero a cambio de seguridad.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina se alegra al ver a Isabel en libertad. Toledo le pide a Ivana que le dé una oportunidad para enamorarla. Sandra y Felipe logran su sueño y se casan por la iglesia en compañía de familiares y amigos.

programme.title: La usurpadora
programme.desc: Una joven humilde se deja manipular por su hermana gemela para que la reemplace y ella se pueda ir con otro hombre.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Renata empieza a trabajar como vendedora de cosméticos porque está harta de que en la casa nadie ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby está triste porque Plutarco encontró trabajo como auxiliar de vuelo y se ausenta. Martina se pone a dieta y Alfonso encuentra una cadenita valiosa que trae problemas.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito se lleva el carro sin el permiso de Ludovico, lo choca y su padre deberá pagar la reparación. Ludoviquito comienza a robar partes de autos cuando su padre lo castiga.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica reciben una invitación para ir a una reunión de ex alumnos en la preparatoria. Federica le inventa a sus ex compañeras que Ludovico es un importante médico.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: En una fiesta de Lucas, una guapa chica le dice a Paco que no está tan mal, pero que se podría ver mejor si se da una manita de gato.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Brayan y Toña van al velorio de la abuelita de su primo el Natas, pero de regreso se traen un espíritu del panteón.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Nace la Leyenda
programme.desc: Sin nada que perder y dejando sus penas atras, comienza la historia de estos cinco personajes que son unidos por el destino y el amor a la música.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta pasa su primera noche en la casa de su papá. Gastón corre a Jose de la escuela y la maestra Hilda la recibe en su casa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le confiesa a Raquel que conquistará a Gastón para que olvide a Mia. Miguel y Mia se encuentran afuera del salón y le dicen a Roberta que no habrá protesta porque los descubrieron. El profesor Enrique regresa al Colegio y se encuentra con Julia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta platica con José y le dice que Gastón la odia, ella cree que fue una carga muy grande y por eso está enojado. Alma dona toda la ropa de Roberta a una casa hogar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón es buscado por la policía y cree que José fue quien los llamó. Mia le pone una trampa a Sol para que deje de usar su perfume. Teo y Miguel van con la policía a casa de Gastón. Miguel quiere impedir que Gastón se vaya.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón se encuentra grave en el hospital y recibe la visita de Enrique, quien aprovecha para pedirle un favor. Miguel encuentra a Franco y Alma besándose, pero ellos le piden que no le diga nada a Roberta y a Mía. José tiene miedo que Gastón muera.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León investiga a Diego y se da cuenta de que le ha estado mintiendo. Sin querer, Sol descubre que Franco y Alma son novios. El director hace una junta para decidir quién ocupará el puesto de Gastón. Jose está muy triste por la muerte de Gastón.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego decide salirse del grupo porque su padre no acepta que sea cantante. Los chicos tratan de convencerlo pero él está decidido. José platica con Lola y le dice que es doloroso ser huérfana.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Damián lleva a cabo sus planes para lograr que Vladimir trabaje en la empresa de Gonzalo. Bárbara le hace creer a Gonzalo que Eduardo no es el buen hombre que dice ser.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Damiana llega al hospital a visitar a Federico mientras Deborah está ahí. Consuelo aconseja a María del Carmen que se aleje de Federico. Cristina le dice a Federico que está embarazada y el hijo es del doctor Robles.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: El doctor Robles le pide a Cristina que reconsidere su decisión de romper su noviazgo. Cristina acepta las condiciones de Federico excepto renunciar al nuevo bebé. Raquela es llevada a la iglesia para ser exorcizada.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: José María le pide a Carlos Miguel que deje tranquila a María del Carmen. María del Carmen le propone a José María que se vayan a vivir a Ojo de Agua. El doctor Fabián le cuenta a Carlos Miguel sobre los estudios realizados a Federico.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Desde su silla de ruedas y envuelto en odio, Federico apunta su arma a José María que baja de unas escaleras. Damiana interviene y le dice a Federico que deje de apuntarle.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Bárbara le hace creer a Lucio que el collar que le entregó vale ocho millones de dólares. Eduardo descubre que Gardenia conoce su verdadera identidad. Vladimir logra convencer a Priscila de darle la oportunidad de trabajar en la empresa de Gonzalo.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Santiago idea un plan para enamorar a Aurora. Eduardo le confiesa a Fernanda el gran amor que siente por ella. Fernanda teme que Erika descubra que Eduardo no la ama.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo teme que Fernanda lo rechace al saber su verdadera identidad. Artemio se molesta al saber que Lucio mató a René. Gardenia idea un plan para enamorar a Eduardo.

programme.title: Novias Impacientes
programme.desc: Varios líos se presentan cuando un médico, una artista y una cantante que no puede cantar, padecen problemas similares.

programme.title: Mamá, soy Paquito

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you how to cook incredible Lamb and Fennel seed skewers A Classic soup with Goats Cheese Scones A surprise little dish using up leftovers and the most amazing rice dish you'll ever see. All this plus loads of fun along the way in this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you blink you'll miss the first dish!! The fastest and tastiest cooked salmon recipe. A fantastic Portabello Mushroom recipe that both vegetarians and meat eaters will both love. Bruschetta three different ways and finished off with a stunning Mediterranean Pork dish is what is in store throughout this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Paul shows you how to cook an amazing dinner party recipe when he stuffs a whole Haddock, Jamaican style. A really quick sweet chilli chicken salad and then Treyvaud's epic steak sandwich with a Flambé you'll have to see to believe. And to finish off the show, a simple but incredible Plum tart.

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul teaches you the history and the anatomy of Venison before cooking a mouth-watering salad with venison loin, pear and blue cheese. Then a great family dinner with Paul's take on Chicken Parmesan. And after showing you just how simple it is to cook Monkfish, Paul finishes the show off with his amazing take on an old Irish classic Bread and Butter Pudding!!

programme.title: Lidias Italian Table
programme.desc: Lidia shares her technique for making a basic marinara, enthusiastically immersing herself in sauce making Lidia's way. She then prepares two faorite pasta dishes: a seafood vermicelli with fresh clams and scallops and a parchment wrapped, baked ziti with mozzarella, marinara and fresh basil. Tutti a tavola! She commands, and we follow joyfully.

programme.title: Lidias Italian Table
programme.desc: Lidia grew up playing hide-and-seek in the corn fields surrounding her home in Pula, Istria. Making polenta at her mother's knee was almost a daily activity. Lidia teaches how to make the best basic polenta, country style. She then demonstrates a family favorite: sautéed polenta with field mushrooms and follows it with the perfect dessert: polenta with honey and fresh strawberries.

programme.title: Lidias Italian Table
programme.desc: Watching Lidia prepare her special dish of chicken with sausage, turning golden brown as the bite size pieces caramelize and nestle together in a hot skillet is a sensual experience. You can smell the aroma of garlic, olive oil, vinegar, and honey wafting through her kitchen. Lidia's second dish, country-style spring chicken with olives and potatoes, is perfect as a follow-up.

programme.title: Lidias Italian Table
programme.desc: Gnocchi is a Lidia favorite. As a child, it was a Sunday dinner staple on the Matticchio table, which Lidia helped her mother cook. The secret to great gnocchi is making it light and fluffy, then shaping it. Lidia makes two gnocchi dishes: gnocchi in Lidia's plain tomato sauce and gnocchi rolled and filled with ricotta/spinach/leek stuffing, dressed with a savory sage butter sauce.

programme.title: Lidias Italian Table
programme.desc: In Italy, a great risotto always brings a smile. Here, we all smile as Lidia prepares Risotto Milanese, a simple risotto with saffron broth, finished with butter and Parmigiano Reggiano, and Suppli di Telefono, risotto rolled into balls filled with prosciutto and mozzarella, then crisply fried. When split, the mozzarella pulls apart like telephone wires, thus the name.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick recounts the first time a group of friends treated him to his first American breakfast and the influence it had on him as a chef. Dishes include: Eggs Benedict "Stellino Style" / Poached Eggs over Chorizo Hash with Tequila Sauce / Chocolate Chip Pancakes.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino tells us about the time his parents visited him in America and he brought them to a Steak House with a surprising menu choice from his late father. Dishes include: Reverse Sear Steak with Port Wine Sauce and Pan Fried Mushroom and Arugula / Wedge Salad.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick ponders on the question of whether or not he could ever be a vegetarian. The answer is a solid "no." However, he has fun trying and in the process discovers some fabulous new dishes which are not exactly vegetarian, but nonetheless are loaded with spectacular flavors. Dishes include: Chilled Cantaloupe Soup / Salmon with Spinach and Pancetta Cream Sauce / Biancomangiare (Sicilian Almond Pudding).

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick shares with us the importance of Sundays and how the day and certain dishes remind him of his family in Sicily. Dishes include: Potatoes with Sun Dried Tomatoes and Rosemary / Pork Chop with Pizzaiola Sauce / Pasta Agghiu e Ogghiu (Pasta with Garlic and Olive Oil).

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Cooking with Carla Hall, Annaleigh Ashford, Drew's News
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall is joining Drew and whipping up some delicious dishes and shares what inspired her to write her new children's book, “Carla and the Christmas Cornbread.” Plus, “B Positive” star Annaleigh Ashford stops by to chat. Then, it's an all new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up. Pop Quiz Week continues, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Judd Apatow, Bridget Moynahan, Drew's News
programme.desc: Judd Apatow stops by to chat about his new book, “Sicker In The Head.” Then, “Blue Bloods” star Bridget Moynahan chats with Drew. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Michelle Buteau, Design Court with Mikel, TikTok Renovation Cori Bosco
programme.desc: “Survival of the Thickest” author and comedian Michelle Buteau stops by to chat. Plus, Design Week continues with TikTok star Cori Bosco, a former teacher who has gone viral for home remodeling and flipping. Then, it's Design Court with Celebrity Interior Designer Mikel Welch.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Jon Hamm, Drew's News with Bobby Moynihan
programme.desc: "Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Brooke Shields, Drew's News with Brooke Shields
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Valentine's Day Show, Gayle King, Taye Diggs, Chris Appleton
programme.desc: It's Drew's Valentine's Day Show where the entire studio audience is filled with singles looking to make a love connection. “CBS Mornings” Co-Anchor Gayle King joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for a super-sized Drew's News. Plus, “All American” star Taye Diggs stops by to chat and gives a few of the singles in the audience some advice with a quick round of “Drew's Love Bug.” Then, celebrity hairstylist Chris Appleton is on-hand to help one newly single viewer get a fresh start with a brand-new look. Plus, Drew is surprising one couple with an engagement re-do.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: John Stamos, BAM Bus, Drew's News:Philadelphia Edition, Hometown Spirit Denver
programme.desc: John Stamos on his new podcast, “The Grand Scheme: Snatching Sinatra.” Plus, meet the three women, who after finding out they all had the same cheating boyfriend, dumped him, bought a school bus naming it after their initials and hit the road for a once in a lifetime road trip across the US. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are taking their desk on the road and serving you the news sunny-side up from Philadelphia. Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Denver.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Mystery Guest, Robin Thede, Drew's News

programme.desc: Dive into the unexplored world beneath the waves: the beautiful, fragile (and often mysterious) deeps of the ocean. 1) Drawings that show the beauty and fragility of Earth | Zaria Forman 2) The lovable (and lethal) sea lion | Claire Simeone 3) A radical plan to end plastic waste | Andrew Forrest 4) Why do whales sing? - Stephanie Sardelis 5) Is climate change slowing down the ocean? | Susan Lozier 6) Deep ocean mysteries and wonders - David Gallo

programme.title: The Business Angle

(1) The single biggest reason why start-ups succeed | Bill Gross (2) The anti-CEO playbook | Hamdi Ulukaya (3) How does the stock market work? | Oliver Elfenbaum (4) How to build (and rebuild) trust | Frances Frei (5) What makes a job "good" -- and the case for investing in people | Warren Valdmanis

programme.title: Afternoon Snack

programme.title: What in the World?

O'Sullivan and Grace E. Cunningham 8) The psychology behind irrational decisions - Sara Garofalo 9) Is life meaningless?
